title: Modules, Packages, Environments, and Command Lines · Guided Program Studio
summary: Turn the reporting pipeline into an installable and repeatable command-line tool. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of an installable data-report command while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain module search, import caching, names, qualified access, and circular-import failure conditions.
Organize public module functions, constants, docstrings, and private implementation names around stable responsibilities.
Use the main guard to separate importable behavior from command-line execution and testing.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-basics cumulative stakeholder program."""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any
